title: fagarastrum thunbergii
intro: Fagarastrum thunbergii, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and anti-bacterial effects. The health benefits of Fagarastrum thunbergii include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Fagarastrum thunbergii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal medicine, and is often combined with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
